author: mark
text:
Deferred-mode reject closes forge-gate child atomically

SPEC §7.3 / conformance §14.8. `bl update <parent> status=in_progress` now closes the auto-opened forge-gate child and drops the dead `gates` link in the same state-branch commit, preserving the invariant that a task is in_progress iff it has no open gate child. Refuses atomically (no mutation) if the gate child is claimed; the work branch on origin is left alone.

cmd_update/apply_field lifted to commands/update.rs (lifecycle.rs was at the 300-line cap); reject_deferred added to review_deferred.rs; close_and_archive now also stages the parent notes sidecar so the reject note rides the same commit. forge_deferred test helpers lifted to tests/common/forge.rs; reject conformance tests split into a new file.
